name: kimiflow
description: Feature and bug-fix loop for Codex with mechanical quality gates, persistent run state, verification, review, and commit hygiene.

interface.shortDescription: Run feature and fix work through mechanical quality gates
interface.longDescription: Kimiflow runs a disciplined feature and bug-fix loop in Codex: clarify, understand or diagnose, plan, pass a mechanical plan gate, implement, verify, code-review, and stop at a commit gate. It keeps persistent .kimiflow run state and uses bundled shell gates for review resolution, commit hygiene, state persistence, and test gating.
